title: isodon brevicalcaratus
intro: Isodon brevicalcaratus, also known as Chinese Isodon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to China, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Preparations of the herb include teas, infusions, and decoctions, often used to relieve coughs and congestion, while also promoting overall respiratory health.
